annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Conn. Gen. Stat. §37-3a — 10% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). §37-3a covers both prejudgment and postjudgment interest as damages for detention of money; §37-3b postjudgment interest runs from the earlier of 20… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
